title: GET /api/v1/accounts/verify_credentials and account endpoints
description: Implement account read endpoints. verify_credentials returns the authed persona's account object. GET /api/v1/accounts/:id returns any account (local or remote). GET /api/v1/accounts/lookup?acct= resolves a handle. Account object serialization must exactly match Mastodon's shape including all required fields.
design: Account.acct: local = username only, remote = username@domain. Account.id: snowflake as string. avatar/header: full URL to media file or default image URL. Account.source only on verify_credentials (privacy settings, etc). All counts (followers_count, following_count, statuses_count) from DB counts.
acceptance_criteria: verify_credentials returns correct account with id as string, acct without domain for local accounts; /accounts/:id works for both local and remote (remote_accounts) actors; lookup resolves username@domain handles; Account.url is the web profile URL
